name: @crewchief/maproom-mcp
description: Maproom MCP server with local LLM embeddings - zero configuration required

scripts.test: node bin/cli.cjs --test || echo 'Test mode not yet implemented'
scripts.release:patch: node scripts/bump-version.js patch && pnpm publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.release:minor: node scripts/bump-version.js minor && pnpm publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.release:major: node scripts/bump-version.js major && pnpm publish --access public --no-git-checks

author: CrewChief
